short: Elon Musk's AI company, maker of the Grok models with real-time access to X.
definition: xAI is an AI company founded in 2023 by Elon Musk that develops the Grok family of large language models, which are integrated into the social platform X and trained partly on its real-time data. It built one of the largest reported clusters of GPUs (the specialized chips used to train AI) to support training. Corporate developments — including reported acquisition talks — move fast and should be verified before publishing.
